title: Binnenhof
description: The Binnenhof is the oldest seat of parliament in the world still in use. Its 13th-century towers have witnessed wars, occupations, liberation, and democratic renewal.
clue: Find the inner courtyard where a statue of William of Orange keeps watch. What motto is engraved on the plaque at his feet?
challenge: Register to vote — or confirm your registration is current — before you leave this courtyard. Photograph the screen showing your completed registration as proof.
